introSection: Flight of the Hippogriff is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Beijing in Tongzhou, Beijing, China. It opened on 20 September 2021 along with the park.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Like the version at Universal Studios Hollywood, this one is a YoungSTAR Coaster from Mack Rides, while the other two are standard Vekoma Junior Coasters. Unlike the others, it has a chain lift hill.

fullText:
Flight of the Hippogriff is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Beijing in Tongzhou, Beijing, China. It opened on 20 September 2021 along with the park.

Like the version at Universal Studios Hollywood, this one is a YoungSTAR Coaster from Mack Rides, while the other two are standard Vekoma Junior Coasters. Unlike the others, it has a chain lift hill.
